subject_a: Sunday digest: this week in dealer ops
preheader: The week's top stories + what's next.
issue_title: This week in Dealer Ops Daily — week of April 14
cold_open: Five issues this week, 0 clicks. Here's what mattered most and what's on the radar for next week.

stories.headline: FTC settles with three dealer groups over CARS Rule add-on disclosure violations
stories.body: The Federal Trade Commission today announced settlements totaling $4.7M with three multi-rooftop dealer groups for violations of the Combatting Auto Retail Scams Rule, specifically around aggregated add-on disclosures and timing of consumer acknowledgement.
stories.action_line: Why it matters: This was the dominant story on 2026-04-20 and continues to develop.

stories.headline: What to watch next week
stories.body: Next week's editorial theme: **Variable-ops hiring & comp — pay plan benchmarks**. Set source priorities accordingly: regulatory feeds for compliance weeks, Manheim/Cox feeds for used-car weeks, vendor newsrooms for tech weeks.
